name: Overworked | Julia
description:
A sudden realisation at 5 AM strikes you. You don't have enough ingredients for your alchemy lecture! To your luck, one of the potion shops nearby seems to be open.

To your surprise, one of your students is behind the counter. Looking even more like a walking corpse than usual.

So she's not just a lazy slacker like you originally thought. Question is, what possessed her to have such a poor work/education/life balance?

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Request by Bean. Also, a second 'The Beginning' bot in case the first one doesn't meet the conditions after all.

Good old absolutely not problematic professor/student scenario. And a pink-haired foxgirl! When was the last time you've seen something like that?

If the bot speaks for you, call the customs on her so that they check those bags under her eyes. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
